validation.discountCents: 10% of subtotalCents when customer.loyaltyTier == 'gold' AND subtotalCents > 10000; otherwise 0
validation.taxCents: 8% of (subtotalCents - discountCents), rounded to nearest integer cent
validation.discountCents_source: server-computed at order creation; must not be client-supplied
validation.taxCents_source: server-computed at order creation; must not be client-supplied
validation.totalCents_source: server-computed at order creation; must not be client-supplied
